description_long: This is a handheld gaming console with a rectangular body and two detachable controllers on either side, known as Joy-Cons. The front features a large, colorful display screen with the Nintendo Switch logo, surrounded by a thin bezel. The left and right controllers each have an array of buttons, thumbsticks, and shoulder triggers, all in a matching light gray color. The back of the device is mostly matte black with the Nintendo Switch logo and visible ventilation grilles and ports for connectivity. The device is compact and designed for portability, with smooth, rounded edges and a robust plastic exterior. Its design is iconic and instantly recognizable as a Nintendo Switch, blending functionality with a sleek, modern aesthetic.
description: A compact, handheld Nintendo Switch gaming console with a large display and detachable light gray controllers. The device features a colorful screen, multiple buttons, and a matte black back with branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the colorful display screen, Nintendo Switch logo, and both light gray controllers with visible buttons and thumbsticks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the device, the profile of the controllers, and the arrangement of side buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black back panel, Nintendo Switch logo, ventilation grilles, and connectivity ports.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the edge of the display, controller details, and the transition between the front and back surfaces.
